Removed_Other.mechanism: Similar to the main flag, it ensures non-local children are not removed during MRD processes in a staged environment.
Removed_Other.purpose: Enhances game reliability during testing phases, preventing accidental loss of important elements.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagFoundationToastNotification_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Introduces a notification system that displays brief messages on the screen.
Removed_Other.purpose: Keeps players informed about important updates or events without interrupting gameplay.

Removed_Camera/UI.name: FFlagUIEditorNoPartSelection_Staged
Removed_Camera/UI.mechanism: Disables part selection in the UI editor.
Removed_Camera/UI.purpose: Simplifies the UI editing experience for players, making it easier to design games.
